intro: Selected press & coverage — from newspaper features on my Utrecht work to international reviews of the audiovisual collaboration Points of Inaccessibility with composer Rafael Anton Irisarri.

items.title: Through a Musical Lens: Points of Inaccessibility
items.quote: Schilp processed the material through point-cloud software, generating abstract imagery in a state of constant flux.

items.title: Rafael Anton Irisarri — interview
items.quote: Points of Inaccessibility began organically out of a chance encounter with Dutch media artist Jaco Schilp.

items.title: Rafael Anton Irisarri ~ Points of Inaccessibility
items.quote: Jaco Schilp was developing real-time, reactive, audio-driven point cloud projections, some of which adorn the album's artwork.

items.title: Points of Inaccessibility Marks a New Phase for Rafael Anton Irisarri
items.quote: Live visuals by Dutch artist Jaco Schilp, whose point cloud system reacts to the sound in real time.

items.title: Echoes from the Digital Void: Points of Inaccessibility
items.quote: Irisarri transformed bowed guitar textures into vaporous scaffolding, fueling Schilp's custom point-cloud software.

items.title: Data Uotan confirma la posibilidad de coexistencia entre el arte clásico y el digital
items.quote: Expresiones de performance, danza, fotografía, pintura y escultura se fusionan con la IA en el espacio cultural No Es Una Galería.

items.title: In het panorama van Jaco zie je Utrecht zonder muren en zijn bomen net sterren
items.quote: Het staat er gewoon — super fijn.

items.title: Jaco maakt lichtsculptuur op Utrecht Centraal voor 900-jarige stad
items.quote: Die iconische stadsgezichten komen uiteindelijk bij elkaar op één groot paneel.

items.title: Indrukwekkende installaties en performances in het voormalige Pieter Baan Centrum
items.quote: A press review of Uncloud's Transliminal, staged in the former Pieter Baan Centrum, Utrecht.

items.title: Watch: Uncloud — Contemporary art & music, by Juri Hiensch
items.quote: A short documentary on Uncloud — the Utrecht art & music organisation co-founded by Jaco Schilp.
